delivery.access: One truck at a time; single lift for vertical movement

lineItems.description: Day 1: pack, dismantle and wrap entire office (8 movers + 4 packers, 8 hrs @ $60/person/hr)
Day 2: finish wrapping and load trucks (8 movers, 8 hrs @ $60/person/hr)
Day 3: deliver to new site (8 movers, 8 hrs @ $60/person/hr)
Day 4: reassemble and unpack (12 crew, 8 hrs @ $60/person/hr)
Day 5: finish and handover (4 crew, 4 hrs @ $60/person/hr)

notes: Silent pods are dismantled and reassembled by the silent pod company. We move them only.
Dropoff is restricted to one truck at a time for parking (client to arrange additional access) and a single lift for all vertical movement. This is built into the 5-day timeline.
Includes dismantle, wrap, pack, transport, reassembly, and on-site rubbish removal by the crew.
Pickup site has simple access with a loading-bay lift.
Dedicated dump run (transporting waste to a disposal facility) is available as an optional extra at additional cost.
